name: tabs_new_and_close
description: Exercise the multi-tab notebook on the center pane. Verifies the wxAuiNotebook is reachable as `locus.chat.notebook`, opens a new tab via the Ctrl+T accelerator, screenshots the two-tab state, then closes the active tab via Ctrl+W and verifies the notebook is still present and the app is still responsive. Regression guard: a previous bug had RemovePage auto-select the '+' placeholder tab; the placeholder PAGE_CHANGING handler then re-fired on_new_tab, creating tabs in an infinite loop. The Ctrl+W close after Ctrl+T exercises that exact path -- a re-run of this script on the fixed build should finish cleanly within a few seconds, while the broken build would hang. Note: the '+' placeholder tab cannot be clicked directly via UIA because wxAuiNotebook does not expose its tabs as TabItem elements; Ctrl+T covers the same on_new_tab() entry point. Pure shell test -- no LLM involvement.
